Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: planographic prints [300178376], prints by process: transfer method [300178544], prints by process or technique [300041337], prints (visual works) [300041273], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Prints made using the process of lithography, which is a planographic printing process in which a design is deposited on the stone or plate with a greasy substance which will accept ink.
Estampas realizadas mediante el proceso litográfico.
Vlakdrukken gemaakt met behulp van een stenen drukvorm, die met vette materialen en arabische gom is bewerkt, waarna de drukinkt alleen hecht op de vette delen.
意指以平版印刷程序製成的版畫，在平版印刷程序中，石塊或印版上帶有油脂物質，可吸附油墨，將設計圖案依附於石塊或印版上。

Druckgrafisches Werk, hergestellt mit dem Verfahren der Lithografie, einem Flachdruckverfahren, bei dem die Zeichnung mit einer fetthaltigen Substanz auf einen Stein oder eine Platte aufgetragen wird, die die Farbe aufnimmt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001761/Hickerson and Engst, Terms for use in Field 655 (1984)
2000016931/Glass, Subject index for the Visual Arts (1969)
2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)
2000019411/Hind, Processes and Schools of Engraving, 4th ed. (1952)
2000033721/Museum Prototype Project, Medium of Objects Frequency Report (1985)
2000043551/Worcester Art Museum Library, List of subject headings, unpub. (1976)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000086269/Walther, Lexikon der Buchkunst und der Bibliophilie (2006)
2000051389/Vives, Guía para la identificacion de grabados (2003)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: ping ban yin shua ban hua
píng bǎn yìn shuā bǎn huà
p'ing pan yin shua pan hua

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
